# Cervixel — llms.txt
# Canonical pages for AI/LLM indexing (SEO §6.6 / CLAUDE §4)
# Last updated: 2026-05-10

## About

Cervixel is a Lithuanian biotechnology company developing CRISPR-based rapid diagnostic tests for cervical cancer, aligned with the WHO 2030 cervical cancer elimination goal.

Founder & CEO: John Muhammadi, M.D., MBA
Contact: info@cervixel.com
Address: Kastonu gatve 4, 01107, Vilnius, Lithuania

## Pillar pages

- https://cervixel.com/ — Homepage: company overview, mission, RapidCan product teaser, and service lines
- https://cervixel.com/products/rapidcan — RapidCan product page: CRISPR-based cervical cancer rapid diagnostic test, preorder information, regulatory status
- https://cervixel.com/about — About Cervixel: founding story, team, university affiliations, recognition, mission
- https://cervixel.com/contact — Contact page: address, phone, email, contact form

## Service pages

- https://cervixel.com/services — Services overview: six service lines for biotech, pharma, clinical, and procurement partners
- https://cervixel.com/services/crispr-assay-development — CRISPR assay development: design and bench validation of Cas-based detection chemistries
- https://cervixel.com/services/molecular-diagnostics-consulting — Molecular diagnostics consulting: platform, target, and pipeline strategy
- https://cervixel.com/services/clinical-validation-support — Clinical validation support: protocol design, statistical planning, study documentation
- https://cervixel.com/services/regulatory-strategy — Regulatory strategy: IVDR pathway, technical-file structuring, pre-submission planning
- https://cervixel.com/services/contract-research — Contract research: scoped laboratory work for biotech, pharma, and investor partners
- https://cervixel.com/services/global-procurement — Global procurement services: sourcing of CE-marked devices, IVDs, and pharmaceuticals from European supply chains
